title: Read Receipt Blues
lyricSeed:
Blue light on my pillow, the message says you're seen
But you don't write me back, oh baby, what's it mean
Three little dots that flicker then fade
My heart in a bubble that never gets saved
Whoa, the ache of a read receipt
Leaves me lonely down the empty street
